content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Equilibrium". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/1556/problem/E
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Then for each test case: The first line contains an integer N, the number of elements in the array. The second line contains N space-separated integers, the elements of the array.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print the index of the equilibrium element if it exists, otherwise print -1.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Calculate the total sum of the array, then for each element, calculate the sum of elements on the left and right. If the sums are equal, the element is an equilibrium element.
